prompt: Create a vertical smartphone wallpaper-style background illustration of an elegant dark Victorian dressing room prepared for a refined tea-time meeting, with the message 整えた心で、君を待つ。 in thin white Japanese Mincho-style lettering near the upper left, including a small decorative divider flourish beneath the text. The scene shows one ornate carved chair draped with one black-and-white maid-inspired garment: a black central panel, white apron-like front, wide white ruffled trim, and a large black bow with a gold brooch and dangling chain tassel at the chest. In the foreground place one polished silver serving tray holding exactly four tea service items: one white porcelain teapot with gold ornament, one matching sugar bowl, one teacup filled with amber tea on a saucer, and one small domed gold bell or covered dish, with one ornate spoon beside it. To the right place one folded white lace-trimmed maid accessory or apron with a black strap and gold medallion, and on the vanity place exactly five vanity objects: one glowing table lamp with a cream shade, one large oval mirror with a gold frame, one glass vase of lavender stems, one lace headband with two purple ribbon bows, and three small round gold boxes. Add exactly two flower arrangements: lavender stems in the glass vase and a small black vase of purple crocus-like flowers in the lower right, with a few loose purple petals on the tabletop. Use dark antique mahogany Victorian interior, warm lamplight, soft daylight entering from a tall window with dark curtains on the left, rich carved wood panels, reflective polished metal surfaces, deep shadows, romantic waiting-room atmosphere, and a muted palette of black, ivory, gold, brown, and violet. Compose the image in portrait orientation, 9:16 aspect ratio, with the chair on the left, vanity and mirror on the right, tea tray in the lower foreground, and generous dark negative space around the quote.
